examples: The blue part of the image is an isopod-a small crustacean.
After a dozen years, the crustacean will grow to the size of a tractor tire.
Researchers found the 70-millimeter crustacean in the dark shale of an Oklahoma quarry.
It will be hard for any new campaign to match Mr Hogan and his well-aimed crustacean.
Another wave interrupted and ripped away its lunch, either saving the crustacean or returning a corpse to the sea.
